group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The first experimental arm (Treatment Arm 1) is "ADT plus D". ADT (Androgen Deprivation Therapy) is a hormonal therapy, and Docetaxel (D) is a chemotherapy agent. Therefore, the classes of agents are Hormonal Therapy and Chemotherapy.
columns.column_name_raw: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
